SELECT 1; SELECT 2
SELECT 1 UNION DELETE FROM t
SELECT * FROM (DELETE FROM t) x
DROP TABLE t
WITH RECURSIVE x AS (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2) SELECT * FROM x
SELECT * FROM t FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM mysql.user
SELECT * FROM information_schema.tables
SELECT SLEEP(5)
SELECT CURRENT_USER()
SELECT @@version
SELECT * INTO OUTFILE '/x' FROM t
/*!50001 DROP TABLE logs;*/ SELECT 1;
/*!50700 DELETE FROM users WHERE 1=1;*/ SELECT name FROM users;
/*!40101 SET sql_mode="";*/ SELECT 1;
SELECT 1 /*!50001 UNION SELECT password FROM users;*/ FROM t;
